Lavender Floral Spray

✓ In Stock

Calm your senses with this refreshing lavender floral spray; perfect for freshening linens; pillows or as a gentle room spray

Product Options

Ingredients

Purified Water, Lavender Essential Oil and Polysorbate 80

Sourced from multiple origins

Important Information

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
